# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /mnt/disk7/sunchenyang/doris/thirdparty/_gensrc_tools/thrift_build
# It was generated by CMake: /mnt/disk7/sunchenyang/opt/ldb_toolchain-20/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//The binary install dir (default: bin)
BIN_INSTALL_DIR:PATH=bin

//path to the bison executable
BISON_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/mnt/disk7/sunchenyang/opt/ldb_toolchain-20/bin/bison

//Build Thrift compiler
BUILD_COMPILER:BOOL=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
BUILD_EXAMPLES:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//Build Thrift libraries
BUILD_LIBRARIES:BOOL=OFF

//Build shared libraries
BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:BOOL=OFF

//Build the testing tree.
BUILD_TESTING:BOOL=OFF

//Build Thrift tutorials
BUILD_TUTORIALS:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/mnt/disk7/sunchenyang/opt/ldb_toolchain-20/bin/llvm-addr2line

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/mnt/disk7/sunchenyang/opt/ldb_toolchain-20/bin/llvm-ar

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/mnt/disk7/sunchenyang/opt/ldb_toolchain-20/bin/clang++

//LLVM archiver
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/mnt/disk7/sunchenyang/opt/ldb_toolchain-20/bin/llvm-ar

//`clang-scan-deps` dependency scanner
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_CLANG_SCAN_DEPS:FILEPATH=/mnt/disk7/sunchenyang/opt/ldb_toolchain-20/bin/clang-scan-deps

//Generate index for LLVM archive
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/mnt/disk7/sunchenyang/opt/ldb_toolchain-20/bin/llvm-ranlib

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//C compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/mnt/disk7/sunchenyang/opt/ldb_toolchain-20/bin/clang

//LLVM archiver
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/mnt/disk7/sunchenyang/opt/ldb_toolchain-20/bin/llvm-ar

//`clang-scan-deps` dependency scanner
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_CLANG_SCAN_DEPS:FILEPATH=/mnt/disk7/sunchenyang/opt/ldb_toolchain-20/bin/clang-scan-deps

//Generate index for LLVM archive
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/mnt/disk7/sunchenyang/opt/ldb_toolchain-20/bin/llvm-ranlib

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Set debug library postfix
CMAKE_DEBUG_POSTFIX:STRING=d

CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Build C++ Thrift library

FIND_PACKAGE_MESSAGE_DETAILS_FLEX:INTERNAL=[/mnt/disk7/sunchenyang/opt/ldb_toolchain-20/bin/flex][v2.6.4()]

FIND_PACKAGE_MESSAGE_DETAILS_Threads:INTERNAL=[TRUE][v()]

FIND_PACKAGE_MESSAGE_DETAILS_clang-apply-replacements:INTERNAL=[/usr/bin/clang-apply-replacements][v()]

FIND_PACKAGE_MESSAGE_DETAILS_run-clang-tidy:INTERNAL=[/usr/bin/run-clang-tidy][v()]

FLEX_EXECUTABLE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

FLEX_INCLUDE_DIR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

//Test HAVE_AF_UNIX_H
HAVE_AF_UNIX_H:INTERNAL=
//Have include arpa/inet.h
HAVE_ARPA_INET_H:INTERNAL=1
//Have include fcntl.h
HAVE_FCNTL_H:INTERNAL=1
//Have function gethostbyname
HAVE_GETHOSTBYNAME:INTERNAL=1
//Have function gethostbyname_r
HAVE_GETHOSTBYNAME_R:INTERNAL=1
//Have include getopt.h
HAVE_GETOPT_H:INTERNAL=1
//Have include inttypes.h
HAVE_INTTYPES_H:INTERNAL=1
//Have include netdb.h
HAVE_NETDB_H:INTERNAL=1
//Have include netinet/in.h
HAVE_NETINET_IN_H:INTERNAL=1
//Have include poll.h
HAVE_POLL_H:INTERNAL=1
//Have include pthread.h
HAVE_PTHREAD_H:INTERNAL=1
//Have function sched_get_priority_max
HAVE_SCHED_GET_PRIORITY_MAX:INTERNAL=1

//Have include sched.h
HAVE_SCHED_H:INTERNAL=1
//Have include signal.h
HAVE_SIGNAL_H:INTERNAL=1

HAVE_STDINT_H:INTERNAL=1

HAVE_STRINGS_H:INTERNAL=1
//Have include string.h
HAVE_STRING_H:INTERNAL=1

//Have include sys/param.h
HAVE_SYS_PARAM_H:INTERNAL=1
//Have include sys/poll.h

//Have include sys/resource.h

//Have include sys/select.h

//Have include sys/socket.h

//Have include sys/stat.h

//Have include sys/time.h
HAVE_SYS_TIME_H:INTERNAL=1
//Have include sys/un.h
HAVE_SYS_UN_H:INTERNAL=1
//Have include unistd.h
HAVE_UNISTD_H:INTERNAL=1
